event_descriptions.EARNINGS_ANNOUNCEMENT: Quarterly or annual financial results release, earnings calls, guidance updates
event_descriptions.MERGER_ACQUISITION: Company mergers, acquisitions, takeovers, buyouts, consolidations
event_descriptions.PRODUCT_LAUNCH: New product/service releases, major updates, market entries
event_descriptions.REGULATORY_ACTION: Government actions, SEC filings, FDA approvals, regulatory compliance
event_descriptions.EXECUTIVE_CHANGE: CEO, CFO, or senior leadership appointments, departures, resignations
event_descriptions.LEGAL_ISSUE: Lawsuits, settlements, investigations, litigation, legal proceedings
event_descriptions.PARTNERSHIP_DEAL: Strategic partnerships, alliances, collaborations, joint ventures
event_descriptions.MARKET_DISRUPTION: Supply chain issues, outages, cybersecurity breaches, operational problems
event_descriptions.DIVIDEND_ANNOUNCEMENT: Dividend declarations, increases, cuts, share buyback programs
event_descriptions.RESTRUCTURING: Organizational restructuring, layoffs, cost-cutting measures, divestitures
event_descriptions.ANALYST_RATING: Analyst upgrades, downgrades, price target changes, research reports
event_descriptions.ECONOMIC_INDICATOR: GDP reports, inflation data, employment figures, Fed decisions
